des: Leody Taveras doubles (1) on a fly ball to right fielder Andrew McCutchen. Pete Alonso scores. Dylan Beavers scores. Colton Cowser to 3rd.
Leody Taveras singles on a line drive to right fielder Andrew McCutchen. Colton Cowser to 3rd.
Ryan Jeffers challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Leody Taveras called out on strikes.
